name: Quiche Lorraine 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Line the baking pan with Pate Brisee to form the shell.
3. Brush the shell with egg white and prick it thoroughly.
4. Chop bacon into 1-inch lengths and cook, stirring constantly, until the fat is almost all rendered out but the bacon isn't quite crisp. Drain on paper toweling.
5. Scald cream, then cool.
6. Combine eggs, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and chives in the cream.
7. Sprinkle bacon and Swiss cheese in the bottom of the shell.
8. Pour batter into the shell.
9. Bake until top is golden brown (test as for a custard) (about 35-40 minutes).
